src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate Java EE annotations from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern runtimes.
Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern application servers.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Changed imports from javax.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped, javax.ws.rs.ApplicationPath, and javax.ws.rs.core.Application to their jakarta equivalents.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replace javax.enterprise and javax.transaction imports with their jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Add import for java.util.Locale to support setting locale on the message entity.
Change message instantiation from constructor arguments to setter methods to accommodate new fields like locale.
Update the welcome message text to reference Quarkus instead of MicroProfile.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: result.setText("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with Quarkus!");

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Set the locale of the message to German as part of the new message structure.
Added a Locale field to the Message entity to support internationalization.
Removed the code field from the Message entity as it is no longer needed.
Simplified the Message constructor to only accept an ID, removing code and text parameters.
Updated equals and hashCode methods to only consider the ID field, removing dependencies on code and text.
Updated imports to include Locale and remove Objects, reflecting the changes in the entity.
Removed the Javadoc comment from the Message class.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl:
- /**
-  * Simple {@code Entity} that represents a welcome messages.
-  */

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Updated the import path for the RestAssured test fixture to reflect a package restructuring in the common test library.
Replaced Hamcrest matchers with AssertJ assertions for more readable and fluent test verification.
Refactored the test to deserialize the JSON response into a Message object and perform explicit field-level assertions instead of a single string prefix check.
Changed the test method visibility from public to package-private, adhering to modern JUnit 5 best practices.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Quarkus from version 2.14.0 to 3.5.0, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.6 to match Quarkus 3.x requirements and modern logging standards.
Add Log4j 2.20.0 as a new logging dependency, likely required by the updated Quarkus stack.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to version 5.10.0 for modern test framework features.
Add AssertJ 3.24.2 as a new assertion library for testing.
Upgrade RestAssured to version 5.3.2 to ensure compatibility with newer Java and HTTP client standards.
Add Jackson 2.15.3 as a new JSON processing dependency.
Replace the old common REST dependency with new modular cloudtrain dependencies for REST, Persistence, and Observability.
Replace the old common test dependency with the new core test dependency.
Add multi-platform Docker build support for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64/v8.
Update Kubernetes cluster route and namespace properties to reflect new infrastructure setup.
Upgrade Maven compiler plugin to 3.11.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade Maven Surefire and Failsafe plugins to 3.2.1 for better test execution support.
Upgrade Maven Docker plugin to 0.43.4 to support newer Docker features and buildx.
Upgrade Maven Compose plugin to 5.0.0.
Upgrade Maven Helm plugin to 5.0.0.
Replace Quarkus RESTEasy with Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive Jackson for improved performance and modern JSON handling.
Add Quarkus Hibernate Validator dependency for bean validation support.
Add Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito extension for mocking in tests.
Replace JUnit Jupiter Engine with AssertJ Core in test dependencies.
Replace cnj-common-test with cnj-common-test-core in test dependencies.
Add Helm resource copying execution to the build process.
Add Helm linting execution to the verify phase.
Add Helm packaging and pushing executions to the package and deploy phases.
Refactor Docker plugin configuration to use buildx for multi-platform builds.
Refactor Helm plugin configuration in integration-test-stage to pull and deploy charts from registry.
Add custom logging manager system property for integration tests.
Add plugin repositories and repositories sections to resolve custom cloudtrain dependencies.
Remove obsolete local-stage profile and unused plugin configurations.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the old 'Run this application' section with a new 'HOW-TO build this application locally' section detailing the Maven command.
Added a new 'HOW-TO start and stop this showcase locally' section replacing the old Docker run command with Docker Compose commands.
Added a new 'HOW-TO demo this showcase' section explaining how to access the application locally and remotely and how to test the API endpoint.
README.md.human_impl: Send a simple GET request to endpoint URI /api/v1/hello

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Explicitly install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to replace the implicit or older JDK version.
Replace manual Helm installation with a shared common installation script to standardize tooling setup.
Add necessary secrets for Nexus, Harbor, GitHub, and OIDC testing to the build environment.
Add parameter store variables for EKS deployment configuration and git tagging identity.
Refactor version string generation to dynamically extract revision from pom.xml and combine with branch/sha1.
Change the primary build goal from 'install' to 'deploy' to push artifacts to the repository.
Wrap EKS authentication and integration tests in a conditional block based on a feature flag.
Add steps to tag the git repository with the project version and push the tag after a successful build.
buildspec.yml.human_impl: git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION ... && git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add SonarQube cache to the build cache paths to speed up subsequent analysis runs.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to a custom CloudTrain JRE 21 image to target Java 21.
Update JVM garbage collector flags to use ZGC with generational support, which is optimized for Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM argument to ensure consistent character handling.
Remove the deprecated -XX:+UseContainerSupport flag as it is enabled by default in modern JDKs.

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-quarkus/.general_idea: Replace the hardcoded Helm chart version with a Maven property placeholder to enable dynamic versioning during the build process.
